goals: Ship NeverZero Workstation beta to 200 design partner teams by Jun 20
Show one real agent doing real work within 60s of signup — no screencast, no preamble
Make AI work multiplayer: registered, coordinated, remembered, resumable
constraints: Never say 'AI assistant' — always 'agent' or by name (Iris, Forge, etc.)
Workspace tier must have shared memory and agent SSO — keep this distinction sharp
Deploy pipeline goes through Lightsprint only — cold start 3× faster on agent workloads
ZeroEntropy v2 for retrieval — 0.91 recall, do not revert to v1

decisions.text: Workspace tier ships with shared memory and agent SSO — differentiates from Solo/Team
Onboarding shows one real agent doing real work in <60s — Iris (research-agent) is the default first agent
Move retrieval to ZeroEntropy v2 — top-3 recall jumped from 0.71 → 0.91 in eval
Rejected: deploy through legacy runner — cold start 3× slower on agent workloads

rejected_approaches: Legacy deploy runner (cold start 3× slower on agent workloads)
ZeroEntropy v1 index (0.71 recall — below quality bar)
Screencast-based onboarding (violates 'real agent doing real work' requirement)
Single-tier pricing (doesn't differentiate shared memory and agent SSO)
